title: ice40: bad port maps generated for post-synthesis verilog of SB_RAM40_4K

features.name: ice40 RAM inference with array-style storage
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration using packed array for data storage combined with always block for read access

features.name: backslash-escaped port connection syntax in generated verilog
features.description: Code should include port mapping with backslash-escaped identifiers using dot-escape syntax like .\NAME[index]
